summary: Synthesized 7 reference sites + aesthetics-of-ai analysis + design system + v4 codebase into a 23K-word v5 spec. Key decisions: scroll-pinned narrative (Lenis+GSAP), Three.js hero, Space Grotesk typography, full-viewport agent reveals, scroll-driven terminal, Gatekeeper color red→gold.
lessons: Reading all source materials before writing produces a much more coherent spec than iterating
PowerShell curl doesn't work like bash curl — use Invoke-RestMethod with -Headers as hashtable
